inicio.texto1: We are committed to providing you with the best service and the highest quality in each of our products, so that your shopping experience is always excellent.

paraEmpresas.beneficios: A benefit for your team. An advantage for your company.
paraEmpresas.que es texto1: A new tool designed for companies looking to recognize, incentivize, or support their work team.
paraEmpresas.que es texto2: It is a prepaid digital card, issued by Don Emilio, that allows you to assign a spending amount to employees, work teams, or internal areas. For exclusive use in our wholesale self-service.
paraEmpresas.beneficio 5: Ideal for rewards, incentives, or internal purchases

aliados.descripcion: We work side by side with the leading brands in the market to guarantee you excellence, variety and the best quality in every purchase.
aliados.si sos: If you are a supplier and want to join the network of
aliados.asesoramos: contact us and we will advise you throughout the process.

contacto.descripcion: We are here to help you. Complete the form and we will contact you as soon as possible.

politicas.texto1: At Don Emilio, we collect information to improve our services. This includes data that you provide directly to us (such as when contacting us) and automatic navigation data.
politicas.texto2: We use your information to respond to your inquiries, improve our website, and communicate important news about our products and services.
politicas.texto3: Our site uses cookies to improve the user experience, analyzing traffic and personalizing the content shown.
politicas.texto4: If you have any questions about these policies, you can contact us through our official channels.

terminos.texto1: By accessing and using the Don Emilio website, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service.
terminos.texto2: All content, trademarks, logos and materials present on this site are the exclusive property of Grupo Don Emilio or its licensors, and are protected by intellectual property laws.
terminos.texto3: It is forbidden to use this site for illegal or unauthorized purposes. The user agrees not to interfere with the proper functioning of the service.
terminos.texto4: We reserve the right to modify or replace these terms at any time. It is recommended to review this page periodically.
